arts.ttl: 'We can't' - Alexis Mac Allister reveals Liverpool true feelings on Mohamed Salah decision
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister hopes to be a Liverpool teammate of out-of-contract trio Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold for a long time

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's newest goal machine earns chance to impress Eddie Howe behind the scenes
arts.sum: Discussing handing opportunities to young players during his time as boss, Howe recently said: "We are working in tandem with the academy. A young Newcastle United striker has followed in the footsteps of Lewis Miley, Trevan Sanusi, Travis Hernes and plenty other up and coming talents after being called up to first-team training by Eddie Howe.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak lifts lid on injury struggles and sets down Newcastle United marker
arts.sum: Isak had missed a handful of games with a toe injury but has made a recovery to take on Liverpool at St James' Park. Isak said: "I definitely feel that we have the quality to win these type of games.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah makes feelings clear on Man City star Liverpool brutally exposed
arts.sum: Liverpool will be wary of Man City's threat in the Premier League title race, despite Pep Guardiola's side entering a tough patch

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe reacts to "foolish" move he was keen to avoid for Newcastle United
arts.sum: Howe told Chronicle Live: "The key thing for me is we try our best to keep Callum fit for as long as possible so he can get into his flow and rhythm. Eddie Howe has stated it would have been "foolish" to field Callum Wilson earlier than the 75th minute at Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Defender who Liverpool are keen to sign claims he is better than Virgil van Dijk
Exclusive: Arsenal & Liverpool monitoring Brazilian winger ahead of potential transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool are both understood to be monitoring LA Galaxy’s highly-rated Brazilian winger Gabriel Pec, sources have told CaughtOffside. The Gunners and the Reds are among a number of Premier League clubs who’ve had scouts keeping an eye on Pec, who is showing himself to be an exciting young talent. arts.ttl: We simulated Newcaste vs Liverpool to get a score prediction for tough away clash
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Newcastle in the Premier League on Wednesday, so we simulated the game to predict what could happen

arts.ttl: Report: 'Unstoppable' player has just agreed to leave title-winning club and join Liverpool
arts.sum: Title-winner has agreed to join Liverpool

arts.ttl: Two major signings for Slot: Liverpool planning £91m spending spree for January
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot could reportedly be given the chance to make two major signings to strengthen his Premier League table-topping squad this January. The Reds have been superb since Slot replaced Jurgen Klopp in the summer, with the Dutch tactician majorly over-achieving so far based on pre-season expectations.
